name: @caura/memclaw
description: OpenClaw plugin for MemClaw central memory

scripts.test: tsc && NODE_ENV=test node --test dist/educate.test.js dist/tool-definitions.test.js dist/env.test.js dist/transport.test.js dist/health.test.js dist/config.test.js dist/runtime-contract.test.js dist/identity.test.js dist/install-id.test.js dist/validation.test.js dist/reconcile-skills.test.js dist/context-engine.test.js dist/heartbeat.test.js dist/keystones.test.js dist/resolve-agent.test.js dist/bootstrap-memoization.test.js
scripts.check:version: bash -c 'V=$(node -p "require(\"./package.json\").version"); grep -qF "PLUGIN_VERSION = \"$V\"" src/version.ts || (echo "version.ts out of sync with package.json ($V): run bash ../scripts/gen-version.sh" >&2 && exit 1) && echo "check:version ok: $V"'
